role: Foundational layer beneath all engines: ingests raw sources, separates SAY/DO/SHOW, grades reliability and confidence, detects contradiction and greenwashing, and emits typed Evidence records that every downstream engine consumes.
principle: Deterministic Python classifies, scores, and grades; Claude (audit/ai.py) is used only for extraction/normalisation of unstructured text into candidate records and is never trusted to assign a final score. A SAY is never promoted to fact without DO/SHOW corroboration.

say_do_show.SAY: Stated intent/claims by management (annual letters, sustainability narrative, press, marketing).
say_do_show.DO: Actions and capital allocation actually taken (capex, contracts, operations, disclosed spend).
say_do_show.SHOW: Independent evidence and realised outcomes (regulators, audited data, news, datasets, third parties).

grounding.claude_extraction: audit/ai.py (lazy client, JSON parse, grounding rules)

data_model.note: Additive Django model `Evidence` (nullable FK to CompanyProfile/Country); zero migration risk; mirrors audit.AIAnalysisJob status pattern for async extraction.

outputs: raw extracted candidate statements + provenance metadata
modules.logic: Fetch/parse sources; Claude (audit/ai.py) extracts candidate factual statements with source+date; dedupe; attach provenance. No classification or scoring here.
modules.uncertainty: Un-sourced or unparseable items dropped or queued; never fabricated.

outputs: each statement typed SAY|DO|SHOW + linked graph_nodes
modules.logic: Rule+Claude classifier: modal/intent language -> SAY; action/capital verbs + figures -> DO; third-party/audited/regulator-sourced + outcome metrics -> SHOW. Map each to graph principle nodes by embedding match over node definitions.
modules.uncertainty: Ambiguous class -> lowest-claim default (SAY) + review flag, so claims are never over-counted as outcomes.

modules.logic: Detect stated commitments, targets, and value claims; capture target metric+year where present (feeds Intent-vs-Reality).
modules.scoring: say_strength 0-1 = specificity x prominence (a dated quantified pledge scores higher than vague aspiration)
modules.uncertainty: Vague claims flagged as low-specificity, weighted down.

modules.logic: Detect actual actions and spend; quantify where possible; tag the topic node (e.g. invested in emissions_responsibility).
modules.scoring: do_strength 0-1 = materiality (size vs revenue) x verifiability
modules.uncertainty: Self-reported DO without independent confirmation capped below SHOW-corroborated DO.

modules.logic: Detect realised outcomes from independent sources; link to the DO that plausibly caused it (causes edge) with corroboration strength.
modules.uncertainty: Outcome with no independent source is NOT a SHOW; reclassified as DO/SAY.

modules.logic: Grade each record: verified (audited/regulator) > analyst-reviewed > ai-seeded > model-estimate.
modules.scoring: confidence_score map: verified 0.95, analyst-reviewed 0.8, ai-seeded 0.5, model-estimate 0.3 (tunable constants)
modules.uncertainty: Low-confidence records excluded from scoring spine; surfaced, never silently used.

modules.logic: Within a topic cluster, compare SAY vs DO vs SHOW: pledge-vs-delivery gaps, claim-vs-outcome conflicts, internal inconsistencies; set contradicts edges.
modules.uncertainty: Apparent contradiction on low-confidence evidence -> flagged tentative, routed to review not asserted.

modules.logic: Compute the SAY-minus-SHOW gap; flag claims (SAY) lacking corroborating SHOW; reuse mizan greenwashing_risk as a prior.
modules.uncertainty: High gap on thin evidence -> 'possible greenwash, unverified' not 'greenwash confirmed'.

modules.logic: Score source by independence and type: independent_audit/regulator high; company self-report medium; marketing/anonymous low. Penalise undisclosed provenance.
modules.scoring: reliability map: regulator 0.95, independent_audit 0.9, dataset 0.85, news(reputable) 0.7, ngo 0.65, self-report 0.5, marketing 0.3
modules.uncertainty: Unverifiable source -> reliability floor + provenance flag.

outputs: per-topic timeline, trajectory, pledge-vs-delivery over time
modules.logic: Order records by published_at; compute trajectory of DO/SHOW vs SAY targets; detect stale claims and reversals.
modules.scoring: recency_weight = decay(now - published_at); trajectory slope per metric
modules.uncertainty: Stale/expired commitments down-weighted; gaps in the timeline flagged.

scoring.evidence_score (per record): evidence_score = source_reliability * confidence_score * recency_weight * type_strength(say|do|show). Range 0-1. SHOW with high reliability scores highest; vague SAY lowest.
scoring.alignment_score (per topic): alignment = corroborated_show_weight / claimed_say_weight, capped 0-1. 1 = claims fully borne out by independent outcomes; low = talk without proof.
scoring.contradiction_score (per topic): contradiction = 1 - alignment, raised by any direct claim-vs-outcome conflict (SAY says improving, SHOW shows worsening = max). Weighted by confidence of the conflicting records so low-confidence conflicts don't dominate.
scoring.greenwashing_risk (per topic): gw = mean( share_of_SAY_without_SHOW , mizan_greenwashing_prior , (1 - alignment) ). High when claims are prominent but uncorroborated.
scoring.topic_confidence: min/weighted-mean of the confidence_scores of the records driving the topic; propagates to downstream engines.

confidence_methodology.rule: Only verified+analyst-reviewed feed the deterministic scoring spine; ai-seeded/model-estimate are advisory and flagged; scholar_review_required propagates from any interpretive graph_node activated by the record.

graph_integration.node_linking: Each EvidenceRecord links to graph principle nodes (graph_index.json) by embedding match; the record inherits those nodes' confidence_level and scholar_review_required.
graph_integration.verse_provenance: ayah_index.json supplies citing verses per linked node, preserving each citation's direct/inferred/modern label (a SHOW never upgrades an inferred link to direct).
graph_integration.engine_handoff: Clusters feed: Company/Country engines (benefit_detection consumes corroborated benefits, harm_detection consumes corroborated harms), Moral Compass (alignment+greenwashing as the SAY/DO/SHOW signal), Executive/Video Brief engines (top contradictions + timeline narrative).

api.POST /api/v1/evidence/ingest: {subject_type, subject_ref, sources[]} -> enqueue collection+classification job (mirrors audit.AIAnalysisJob)
api.GET /api/v1/evidence/{evidence_id}: single record with provenance + graph_nodes + ayah_refs
